title: aeonium × hybridum
intro: Aeonium × hybridum, also known as the Echeveria × hybridum, is a hybrid succulent plant that is a cross between the Aeonium and Echeveria genera. This plant is valued for its vibrant, long-lasting blooms and striking foliage, which can be used to create various herbal remedies. The medicinal properties of Aeonium × hybridum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of consuming herbal preparations made from this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve.
